label: EM-DAT International Disaster Database
expected_strengths: historical disaster occurrence and impact records
known_limitations: may be country-level rather than district-level
may not include smaller local flood events
license and attribution requirements must be documented
required_review_steps: confirm Malaysia flood records are available
check whether records can map to historical_flood_events.csv
decide whether EM-DAT is target-label source, validation source, or seed source only
notes: Potentially strong target-source candidate, but not approved for training until data access, license, location, date, and target mapping are validated.
